description: Original Caly TTS lines for games. Clinical-aligned, assent-aware, celebratory.

toddler.game_intro: Hi friend! I am Caly Sprout! Let's play a word game together. Tap the picture you hear!
toddler.tap_intro: Find the word I say. Tap the picture!
toddler.caly_says_intro: Caly Says! Listen to me, then tap the picture!
toddler.parade_intro: Word parade! Watch the pictures go by, then tap the one I name!
try_again: Almost! Tap another one, or skip.
toddler.skip: Skipping is always okay. New word coming!
toddler.streak_3: Three in a row! You are a word superstar!
toddler.caregiver_cue: Grown-ups: model the word by pointing and saying it calmly.

child.game_intro: Hey explorer! Caly Quest here. Ready for a word adventure?
child.tap_intro: Find the word on the quest board!
child.match_intro: Match the picture to the word: {word}.
child.caly_says_intro: Quest challenge! Caly says — tap the symbol!
child.parade_intro: Symbol parade! Find the word I call out.
try_again: Not quite — want a hint or skip?
Good effort. Try another or press skip.
child.caregiver_cue: Caregivers: pause and model if they want help — no pressure.
